title: Ender Arsenal/Amarite
description: RAT's Arsenal/Amarite mods retexture to look like the End.
body:
**WARNING: RAT's Arsenal and/or Amarite mods are required to work for the resource pack to change anything!**

Yeah no that's it. I just changed Amarite to Endamarite (even changed the name) and the Arsenal weapons to the Harbor of Sacrifice (anchorblade) and the Void Skiver (scythe).

Thank you doctor4t for the mods!
